summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of new MANUAL quote workflow. All 16 backend pytest tests passed (create-job-no-auto-price, track null amount, save-quote draft, quote-preview template, send-quote full flow incl. SMTP success, auth-required negatives, 404s, validation). Frontend end-to-end: admin login -> /admin Quote requests tab -> 21 jobs visible -> Set Quote input filled -> Save Price -> Send Quote -> modal opens with prefilled subject 'Your Nosko quote - Job <job_id>' + 1258-char HTML referencing $199.99 -> Edit/Preview toggle works -> Confirm send -> toast 'Quote emailed to ...' + SENT badge with date -> /track/<job_id> shows $199.99 in track-quote-amount. Pending track was indirectly verified via pytest test_track_returns_null_for_pending PASSED.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for shadcn DialogContent - a11y nit, add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to suppress.

action_items: Optional a11y polish: add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to SendQuoteDialog to silence Radix warning.
Code quality: /app/backend/server.py is ~1365 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, jobs, quotes, admin, settings) - exceeds 700-line guideline.

Track page also re-shows the quote even when status='draft' (because backend returns quoted_amount once admin saves price, and the UI shows it whenever quoted_amount != null). Confirm with product whether 'draft' price should be hidden from customer's tracking page until SENT. Currently a customer who never received an email could see a price if admin saves but doesn't send.
critical_code_review_comments: Track endpoint exposes quoted_amount even when quote_status='draft' - this could leak un-sent prices to customer tracking page. Consider returning quoted_amount only when quote_status='sent'.
server.py is 1365 lines - violates 700-line guideline; recommend splitting into routers.
send-quote endpoint correctly raises 502 if SMTP fails AND correctly does NOT update DB to 'sent' on SMTP failure (verified by test).
Anonymous POST /api/jobs handles SMTP failure with try/except - good (fire-and-forget).
All 4 admin quote endpoints correctly enforce require_admin (401 returned without token, verified).
build_quote_email_template correctly references customer name, job_id, and formatted amount in subject + html + text.
Track endpoint has reasonable null-safe fallback: quote_status default = 'pending' if amount is None/0, 'sent' otherwise (covers legacy jobs).
seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable jobs prefixed 'TEST ' on each run; no manual seed data required. SMTP actually works in this preview env, so real emails were sent to test_quote@example.com / test_smtp@example.com during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote workflow is fully working backend + frontend. test_quote_flow.py is the canonical regression suite for these 4 endpoints. SMTP is configured and live, so /send-quote will actually email customers - use throwaway emails. Only open question: should 'draft' quoted_amount be hidden from customer track page until sent? Currently it leaks. Previous iterations 1-3 (and reportedly up through 7 per main-agent note) covered auth/jobs/availability/settings.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Workflow implemented correctly per spec.
